message: Node started: Identify the core geometric principle relating the number of chords and intersections to the number of regions. Using the formula R = 1 + n + I, where n is the number of chords (n = 25) and I is the number of intersections, derive the expected number of regions E[R] = 1 + n + E[I]. Use the expected number of intersections E[I] calculated in the previous subproblem to provide the final numerical result.
